races.name: Human
races.description: Humans are everywhere in Faleria, from the coldest mountains, to the driest deserts. While most other mortals are born with special skills or abilities, with wit or cunning, humans are born with naught. Where as other mortals are born with advantages, humans need to work for theirs and there lies humanities power. Humans are born to choose their fate and, when that fate doesn't suit them, they will adapt to the world or adapt the world to them.

subraces.name: Adept Human
subraces.description: Adept Humans are a cornerstone of Faleria. They can be found in any society, in any tavern or farm, for they live to adapt. Humans with these talents can come from anywhere and be however many faces there are in crowded streets. It is a tragedy that most of them would never know of their gift of resilience and indomitability until it’s too late to enjoy it.

subraces.name: Veteran Human
subraces.description: Veteran Humans have gone through a hard life that shaped them. No less adaptable than others, these humans can easily adapt their skills as they see fit. Any of them can tell you stories of a troubled past, a busy life, a lost home, or even all of them combined.

feat_human_versatility.name: Human Versatility
feat_human_versatility.description: You gain one feat of your choice.

feat_adept_quick_learner.name: Quick Learner
feat_adept_quick_learner.description: Whenever you gain an Ability Score Improvement you can increase one additional ability score by 1. If you gain a feat instead, you don’t gain an additional ability score, but can choose to change what ability score increase said feat gives, if any.

feat_adept_malleable.name: Malleable
feat_adept_malleable.description: You gain half proficiency in a skill of your choosing. This half proficiency may be changed after finishing a long rest.

feat_veteran_sharp_mind.name: Sharp Mind
feat_veteran_sharp_mind.description: For the purposes of multiclassing, you can ignore ability score prerequisites.

feat_veteran_long_life.name: Long Life
feat_veteran_long_life.description: You can choose 2 backgrounds instead of 1. The second background you choose does not give you items nor gold.
